response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on web technologies, but the role requires deep C++ expertise in industrial automation and cloud platforms. While there is some C/C++ exposure, it is not the primary focus of their recent work, and their experience with industrial cybersecurity, secure coding practices, or large-scale distributed systems is limited.
strengths: Extensive experience with full-stack development, including TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS).
Proven track record in open-source contributions and event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective platform).
Strong problem-solving and mentorship skills, evidenced by workshops, talks, and technical leadership.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ (last noted in 2015), which is core to the role.
No explicit experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle (SDL).
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile development, while the role focuses on industrial automation and embedded systems.
